name: Cherry Vanilla Ribbon Pie
recipeIngredient: 3 3/8 oz French vanilla instant pudding mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, beat the cream cheese until fluffy.
2. Gradually add the sweetened condensed milk and continue beating until smooth.
3. Slowly incorporate the cold water and French vanilla pudding mix until well combined.
4. Gently fold in the whipped cream.
5. Spread half of the cream cheese mixture into the chilled pie shell.
6. Top with half of the cherry pie filling.
7. Repeat the layering process.
8. Chill for 2 hours before serving.
